scripts.migrate:dev: dotenv -e ../../.env -- pnpm -w exec prisma migrate dev --schema packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.migrate:deploy: dotenv -e ../../.env -- pnpm -w exec prisma migrate deploy --schema packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:push: dotenv -e ../../.env -- pnpm -w exec prisma db push --schema packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.seed: dotenv -e ../../.env -- pnpm -w exec prisma db seed --schema packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma
